_meta.description: Legitimate forwarding-alias provider domains. An address at one of these is NOT disposable — it forwards to a real, permanent inbox the user controls. Site owners blocking disposable signups should NOT block these. Note: domains like icloud.com, proton.me, protonmail.com, pm.me are NOT listed because they are primarily personal mailboxes, not alias providers; we cannot reliably tell from the domain alone whether a given address on those is a Hide-My-Email alias or a primary inbox.
